title: Open Cloze: The World of Penguins

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: Penguins are remarkable creatures that have adapted to some of the harshest environments on Earth. 1.1. _________ there are eighteen recognised species, they vary enormously in size, from the tiny Little Blue Penguin, which stands just 30 centimetres tall, to the Emperor Penguin, 1.2. _________ can reach well over a metre in height. What sets penguins 1.3. _________ from other birds is their complete inability to fly. Instead, their wings have evolved into powerful flippers 1.4. _________ allow them to dive to impressive depths in search of food. Emperor Penguins, in 1.5. _________, are capable of holding their 1.6. _________ for up to twenty minutes while hunting beneath the Antarctic ice. The breeding habits of penguins are equally fascinating. Males often play a key 1.7. _________ in incubating eggs, balancing them on their feet to keep them off the frozen ground. Penguin colonies can number in the hundreds of thousands, and the noise they 1.8. _________ is truly deafening. Sadly, 1.9. _________ to climate change and overfishing, several penguin species now face serious threats to their survival. Conservation efforts are under 1.10. _________ in many parts of the Southern Hemisphere, but scientists warn that much more needs to be done.
